api_params.negative_prompt: any motion, movement, animation, animated, camera movement, panning, zooming, tilting, shaking, handheld, dolly, tracking shot, crane shot, push in, pull out, orbit, arc shot, parallax, motion blur, unstable, wobble, drift, rotation, rain falling, raindrops, smoke, smoke drifting, flicker, flickering, pulse, pulsing, ripples, water motion, shimmer, shimmering, particles, light flicker, dynamic lighting, people, faces, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, scene change, cut, transition

scenes.name: Tokyo Alleyway
scenes.prompt: Static locked tripod shot. Dark rainy Tokyo alleyway at night, neon signs reflecting in wet cobblestone puddles, dim orange lamplight, narrow empty street, no people. Frozen single-frame still. No motion at all. Everything completely motionless. Cinematic noir still photograph.

scenes.name: Vintage Jazz Bar
scenes.prompt: Static locked tripod shot. Dimly lit vintage jazz bar interior, empty wooden stage with upright piano and standing microphone, single amber spotlight, dark mahogany walls, no people. Frozen single-frame still. No motion at all. Everything completely motionless. Cinematic noir still photograph.

scenes.name: Neon Rooftop
scenes.prompt: Static locked tripod shot. Dark rain-soaked rooftop overlooking vast neon city at night, wet concrete reflecting city lights, lone empty wooden chair, low fog, no people. Frozen single-frame still. No motion at all. Everything completely motionless. Cinematic noir still photograph.

scenes.name: Late Night Cafe
scenes.prompt: Static locked tripod shot. Late night cafe interior, warm amber light inside, empty table with coffee cup and open book, blurred neon city lights outside the rain-streaked window, no people. Frozen single-frame still. No motion at all. Everything completely motionless. Cinematic noir still photograph.

scenes.name: Noir Detective Office
scenes.prompt: Static locked tripod shot. 1940s noir detective office at night, single brass desk lamp casting warm pool of light, venetian blind shadows on a dark window, whiskey glass and papers on a wooden desk, no people. Frozen single-frame still. No motion at all. Everything completely motionless. Cinematic noir still photograph.
